response.justification: While the candidate possesses extensive technical experience in software development, including highly relevant work in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms, their resume lacks any explicit experience in direct people management. The role is a mid-to-senior management position requiring at least 2 years of conducting 1:1s, performance management, and team leadership, which are not demonstrated in the candidate's strictly Individual Contributor (IC) background.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across diverse stacks, easily exceeding the 8-year minimum requirement.
Strong domain expertise in engineering productivity, including building CI/CD pipelines, test runners, and developer tools.
Relevant exposure to mobile platform ecosystems through iOS app development and mobile device orchestration tools.
concerns: No documented experience in direct people management, performance reviews, or conducting one-on-ones.
Lacks evidence of leading broad organizational change or managing mid-to-senior level engineering teams.
Career trajectory is strongly aligned with an Individual Contributor (IC) path rather than an Engineering Management track.
